summary: As-built report for the legibility feature (FR1-FR9, refreshed for UAT rounds 1-2 + D12): 5-layer draw order + opaque title plate + tightened & de-collided edge labels (vs labels/nodes/edges) + border-filling fan spread + FR9 lane separation + crossing GAPS (arc->gap pivot, D11) + heading-order fan ports (D12 API-fan de-knot), all deterministic and byte-parity-mirrored in the interactive runtime; toggleable via `bridges`/--no-bridges; flow+state+class covered, sequence excluded. All phases green: 388 unit / 79 e2e / hands-on (incl. live drag); review round 6 APPROVE (caught+fixed REV-002 earlier, REV-009 in-round); test round 6 GREEN. TEST-004 (extreme-drag re-merge) dispositioned wontfix as a documented follow-up at the user's D13 accept; left/right side attachment also a follow-up. Refreshed as-built flow diagram, updated report.md, plan.md, and code-review-standards / test-strategy knowledge. Awaiting UAT (/gogo:done to ship).
